message:
feat(F6): regime-shift detector + bounded runtime retuning for decode policy

Implements bounded online regime-shift detection (CUSUM-based) that retunes
decode-policy thresholds at runtime using deterministic update rules, with
hard caps (±200 permille) and automatic reversion to conservative defaults.

Key additions:
- RegimeDetector with bounded 32-entry windowed statistics accumulator
- CUSUM drift detection on density and pressure features across decodes
- RetuningDeltas struct with clamped adjustments to policy loss model
- Automatic rollback on decode failure or double-threshold breach
- Oscillation limiter (3 cycles → permanent conservative lock)
- 12 unit tests covering: stability, shift detection, delta bounds,
  rollback, oscillation lock, window bounds, deterministic replay
- 7 regression invariant tests in raptorq_perf_invariants.rs
- Structured logging with regime_score, regime_state, retune/rollback
  counts, delta values, and replay pointer in benchmark output
- Full DecodeStats observability surface (8 new fields)

Closes asupersync-j96j4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1011,6 +1011,9 @@ fn emit_campaign_decode_log(scenario: &RepairCampaignScenario, stats: &DecodeSta
          \"policy_budget_exhausted\":{},\
          \"factor_cache_hits\":{},\"factor_cache_misses\":{},\"factor_cache_inserts\":{},\
          \"factor_cache_evictions\":{},\
+         \"regime_score\":{},\"regime_state\":\"{}\",\"regime_retune_count\":{},\
+         \"regime_rollback_count\":{},\"regime_window_len\":{},\
+         \"regime_delta_density_bias\":{},\"regime_delta_pressure_bias\":{},\
          \"repro_command\":\"{}\"}}",
         F4_CAMPAIGN_SCHEMA_VERSION,
         scenario.scenario_id,
@@ -1043,6 +1046,13 @@ fn emit_campaign_decode_log(scenario: &RepairCampaignScenario, stats: &DecodeSta
         stats.factor_cache_misses,
         stats.factor_cache_inserts,
         stats.factor_cache_evictions,
+        stats.regime_score,
+        stats.regime_state.unwrap_or("unknown"),
+        stats.regime_retune_count,
+        stats.regime_rollback_count,
+        stats.regime_window_len,
+        stats.regime_delta_density_bias,
+        stats.regime_delta_pressure_bias,
         F4_CAMPAIGN_REPRO_CMD,
     );
 }
